name: snap
description: Capture a screenshot and/or collect measurements of a page served by Stencila. Returns JSON measurement data as text and, when screenshot is enabled, the PNG image for visual inspection.

route.description: Route on the running Stencila server (e.g. "/" or "/docs/guide/"). Defaults to "/".

screenshot.description: Whether to capture a screenshot. Defaults to true.

selector.description: CSS selector to capture or measure a specific element.

full_page.description: Capture the full scrollable page instead of just the viewport.

devices.description: Multiple device presets for batch measurement.

dark.description: Force dark color scheme. Mutually exclusive with 'light' and 'print'.

light.description: Force light color scheme. Mutually exclusive with 'dark' and 'print'.

print.description: Emulate print media (A4 dimensions). Incompatible with 'dark' and 'light'.

measure.description: Measurement preset determining which selectors to measure.

tokens.description: Extract resolved CSS custom property (theme token) values.

wait_for.description: Wait for a CSS selector to exist before capturing.

delay.description: Additional delay in milliseconds after page is ready.

resize.description: Screenshot resize mode. 'auto' resizes only when needed for hard image limits, 'optimize' downscales more aggressively to reduce payload size, and 'never' preserves the original capture. The tool defaults to 'optimize' to keep screenshot payloads smaller for model token usage.

max_image_dimension.description: Maximum screenshot dimension in pixels after resize. Used with 'auto' or 'optimize'. Defaults to 4096 for this tool when omitted so screenshots stay smaller for model token usage.
